companies.name: PepsiCo

companies.surpriseNote: Revenue beat ($24.18B vs $23.96B est.); core EPS $2.20 vs $2.19 est. (in line with broader consensus of $2.21); NA beverage volume fell 4%; organic revenue +2.4%; FY26 guidance affirmed

companies.name: Simply Good Foods
